body_txt: The old carnival routine where a person (usually a Lovely Assistant ) stands against a board as a target (sometimes a spinning wheel to ramp up the danger). The skilled performer throws razor-sharp knives, and each blade just misses the assistant's body, leading to a Knife Outline on the target. Usually faked when done in live action, even where the possibility of error is supposed to be realistic. Too many things can go wrong , and Lovely Assistants in Stripperiffic outfits aren't easy to come by these days. Compare William Telling , another show of Improbable Aiming Skills .
